sections.content: Welcome to your **free Business Studies** lesson on **Classification of businesses** (1.2). This is syllabus point 1.2 on **Paper 1 (Short Answer and Structured Questions)** — structured like a premium revision course, with past-paper practice built in.

sections.content: Cambridge 7115 rewards answers tied to the case business — name the firm, quote stimulus data, and balance advantages against disadvantages. On Paper 1 (Short Answer and Structured Questions), Classification of businesses often appears as part of a longer structured or case question.
